profile.name: Julyan Valenth
profile.title: Tech Interest & Developer
profile.subtitle: Computer Science undergraduate majoring in Software Engineering
bio: Hi! I'm Julyan Valenth Jonathan Sambouw, a Computer Science student specializing in Software Engineering based in Jakarta. I specialize in building intuitive mobile applications that combine clean architecture with great user experience.

With hands-on experience in both mobile and back-end development, I bridge the gap between solid technical foundations and seamless app experiences. I'm passionate about solving real-world problems through thoughtful mobile solutions built with Flutter, Dart, and Node.js.
profile.statement: I'm a passionate developer who turns ideas into real mobile products. I focus on clean code, sharp solutions, and seamless user experience.
profile.description: Computer Science undergraduate majoring in Software Engineering, with a deep interest in mobile application development. Experienced in building mobile applications hands-on using Flutter and Node.js.

projects.title: Genshin Import
projects.description: Mobile shop app for Genshin Impact weapons & artifacts with Google OAuth, JWT auth, admin panel, and transaction history.

projects.title: BudgetMate
projects.description: Mobile budgeting app that automatically syncs and parses bank & e-wallet transaction emails from Gmail for personal finance tracking.

projects.title: GC Content Analysis
projects.description: Computational analysis of GC content impact on thermal adaptation in 91 bacterial genomes using inferential statistics and machine learning.
